name: Intangible Drilling and Development Costs (IDCs) Expensing

eligibility.description: Available to operators and investors in oil, gas, or geothermal properties for costs like labor, fuel, and repairs that have no salvage value.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to elect to immediately deduct intangible drilling and development costs for oil, gas, and geothermal wells instead of capitalizing them.
